canonical_name: all the folk of the household
an ugly bastard who fought left-handed and got through my guard
the surgeon who stitched it up for me
one of the Emperor Lucius' men
such a woman as that lady Isotta
the room where Avalloch slept with Maline and the younger children
another room usually allotted to guests of importance
a man old enough to be your father
all the pretty young maidens in the village-
the only mother he can remember
